markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content quality issues and discuss performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Audit:** GrowthX is auditing 12 recent articles to fix quality issues (inaccurate positioning, broken links) and will resubmit them in two batches (6 this week, 6 next).](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Performance:** Looker Studio shows strong growth in engaged blog sessions and keyword rankings, validating the content strategy despite recent quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Cadence:** The publishing cadence will remain at 5 articles/week to stabilize quality. This is justified because "refreshes" are full rewrites of thin legacy content, not minor edits.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Reporting:** Reporting will be split by business group (BES, Forensics) to provide targeted insights. A new, more flexible LLM tracking tool will launch in Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Audit

  - [**Problem:** Recent content contained inaccurate positioning, poor research (broken/irrelevant links), and inconsistent formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Cause:** A "pipeline problem" in the content creation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Solution:** A full content audit led by GrowthX's Head of Content.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Scope:** 12 articles submitted since Dec 5.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [**Process:** Rebuilding the editorial checklist based on Rimkus feedback and existing writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
          - [**This Week:** Resubmit 6 audited articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
          - [**Next Week:** Resubmit the final 6 audited articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [**Collaboration:** GrowthX will share the new editorial checklist for calibration once the audit is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Performance & Cadence

  - [**Looker Studio (GA4 Data):**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Steady "up and to the right" growth on blog pages.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** Scaling with traffic, showing content quality is high.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Keyword Rankings:** Strong upward trend in queries ranking on Google.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**Cadence Decision:**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Decision:** Maintain the 5 articles/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritize quality stabilization over quantity.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Context:** "Refreshes" are full rewrites of thin legacy content (often from email campaigns), not minor edits. This work requires the same effort as a new article.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### Reporting Enhancements

  - [**LLM Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**Current:** Tracked internally via Scrunch and Looker Studio (for LLM referrals).](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**Future:** A new, more flexible GrowthX-built tool launches in Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
          - [**Goal:** Provide more in-depth, customizable tracking of LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
          - [**Rollout:** A dedicated sync will be scheduled in Q1 to review the tool and gather Rimkus input.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Business Group Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Need:** Track performance separately for Forensics and BES to provide targeted feedback to their respective marketing leads.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will configure Looker Studio to segment data by business group.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**Slack Access:** Jen Bulmash is experiencing recurring sign-out issues.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
      - [**Action:** Jen will work with Rimkus IT and Nora to resolve the internal access problem.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**Looker Studio Access:** Requires a Google account.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Vitali Edrenkine uses a personal Gmail account (`rimkus@gmail.com`) for access.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Resubmit 6 audited articles by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Resubmit the final 6 audited articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [Share the new editorial checklist for calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Configure Looker Studio to segment performance by business group.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
      - [Schedule a Q1 sync to review the new LLM tracking tool.](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**Jen Bulmash:**](https://fathom.video/share/SVjJvey27sGm2_sHV5PA4v9y-nKxzgEs?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
